# Slab Savvy

> Slab Savvy is a collection of tools and services for sports card collectors and dealers, built by Nathan Wiebe, a Canadian Chartered Professional Accountant (CPA) who collects cards himself. It covers inventory tracking, Canadian tax guidance for sellers, and AI photo enhancement.

Key facts:
- Founded and run by a Canadian CPA who is an active sports card collector
- Focus: the business side of the card hobby — tracking, taxes, and selling
- Audience: card dealers and collectors in Canada and the US, primarily on eBay, COMC, MySlabs, and Facebook groups

## Products & Services

- [Slab Savvy Tracker](https://www.slabsavvycpa.com/waitlist): AI-powered inventory tracking for card dealers. Send a photo of a card via Telegram, confirm the details, and a spreadsheet row is created automatically with recent comparable sale prices. Currently in beta with a waitlist.
- [The Card Collector's Tax Playbook](https://www.slabsavvycpa.com/playbook): A free 62-page guide to Canadian tax rules for sports card sellers — GST/HST thresholds, capital gains, hobby-versus-business classification, deductions, and record-keeping. Includes a free Google Sheets inventory template.
- [DisplayMyCard](https://displaymycard.com): Sister product. AI photo enhancement for sports cards — turns a smartphone photo into a professionally staged image for listings and social posts.

## Content

- [Blog](https://www.slabsavvycpa.com/blog): Articles on card-selling taxes, dealer workflows, and running a card business.
- [FAQ](https://www.slabsavvycpa.com/faq): Direct answers about the products, Canadian tax basics for card sellers, and who is behind Slab Savvy.
